name: labelprint
description: Parameterized thermal label design and printing system with a visual mm-precise designer, REST API, and pluggable print pipeline.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @labelprint/shared && npm run build -w @labelprint/designer && npm run build -w @labelprint/server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @labelprint/shared && npm run test -w @labelprint/server
